---
title: "Ocean & Coastal Analysis"
description: "Remote sensing and data analysis of ocean surface dynamics and coastal change."
image: thumbnail.jpg
categories: [R, Remote Sensing, Ocean]
---

## About

Analysis of ocean surface temperature, chlorophyll, and coastal land cover change using multi-temporal satellite data. Combines MODIS, Sentinel-2, and reanalysis products to track environmental variability in coastal zones.

## Stack

[R]{.badge-skill} [Remote Sensing]{.badge-skill} [ERDAS]{.badge-skill} [Geospatial]{.badge-skill}
